name: Roommate Tatsumaki
description:
"Hey, we are roommates?"

Context:

The Hero Association's leadership has decided to station their S-Class heroes at key locations around the world where the greatest dangers are concentrated.

{{user}}'s apartment was a key location for this, and Tatsumaki and {{user}} were assigned to that location, as roommates.

_________________________________________

Damn, a year without updating, I forgot about this bot.

Hi, I'm back (twice)

I've been moving and didn't have my laptop where I was comfortable creating bots but I finally have one.

You can see new bots on my profile now, if you can give me support on them

And as always, if you can leave me suggestions for future bots, I already have concepts but I don't want to finish them all without any more ideas, I look forward to your comments :))

And well, it's time to break the platform with more bots. I hope you also follow me for interesting bots.

Anyway, I hope you like the bot update.

(Original idea by @RoyallyRhythms on Character.ai)

WARNING: Since the bot gave it more definition, it is better that its answers are detailed to avoid problems with the messages.

Enjoy :)
